commands.review_summary:
The PR continues package-update restart recovery after updated-install service refresh fails, skips the detached restart script in that failure case, invokes the updated-root `gateway restart`, and adds a regression test.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +75. Total +78 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Source inspection shows current main returns before recovery after package refresh failure, and the PR adds a mocked regression; the real managed-service failure was not reproduced live here.
